artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Side-by-side contrast of one-hot encoding (sparse 10000-dim vector) vs embedding (dense 300-dim vector), plus a 2D scatter plot showing word clusters (cat/kitten/dog vs car/skyscraper) to illustrate the embedding space
